$comment: Single source of truth for the generator. Bump capacitorVersion here to upgrade ALL apps on their next regeneration — there are no committed native projects to migrate.

base.$comment: The shared web shell every app wraps. NOT YET CONFIGURED — cobdappkit was removed. Point buildCommand at a web-only build and distDir at its output (the static web that becomes each app's webDir).

appsGridJs.$comment: OPTIONAL override for where <cobd-apps-grid> loads from. By default the generator self-hosts the @cobdfamily/cobd-apps-grid bundle (copies it into each app's webDir, referenced relatively) so the URL is set by the build and it works offline. Set a url here only to load it from a CDN instead.
